summary.note: Login page slice implements all non-blocked requirements from LOGIN_PAGE_SPEC.zh-CN.md. Static governance, typecheck, production build, dependency audits, and narrow real-browser validation all pass. Contract-blocked capabilities (registration, password recovery, account management) remain excluded. COR closure status remains owned by Direction 4; this report supplies candidate evidence only.

CURRENT_IMPLEMENTED: Default login surface with product identity and task description
Account and password fields with validation
Invalid credentials state with safe account retention
Service unavailable banner for non-auth-required failures
Safe return path sanitization and navigation
Return to public competitions or original page
Desktop, tablet, and narrow responsive layout
PROHIBITED: Sensitive query parameters in return URL
Display of raw upstream error messages

COR-009.title: 登录状态与文案分层
changes: Auth store now records lastErrorKind (ApiClientErrorKind) after login failure.
LoginView distinguishes validation errors, invalid credentials (auth-required), and service-unavailable/network/timeout/upstream/server errors.
Session expired state is triggered by /login?reason=expired from router guard and main.ts auth-loss subscription.
Safe return path only uses sanitized pathname/search/hash; sensitive keys rejected.
validation: Browser: empty account shows inline validation and focuses account input.
Browser: empty password shows inline validation and focuses password input.
Browser: invalid credentials show '账号或密码错误。' alert, clear password, focus password.
Browser: /login?reason=expired shows '登录已过期' warning banner; account field receives focus.
Browser: intercepted 503 login response shows '登录服务暂不可用' error banner.

COR-011.title: Token 修复：缺失/无效语义 Token
changes: LoginView uses --workspace-viewport-h, --bg, --surface, --text, --text-muted, --accent-strong, --danger, --border, --workspace-border-w, --r-lg, --shadow-lg, --fs-sm, --fs-xl, --s-1..6 and scoped media query padding.
validation: Browser: computed style resolves Token values in light theme; dark theme uses same Token names via CSS variables.

COR-012.title: 共享 Token 整理与原始视觉值归一
changes: Scoped width min(100%, 420px) is the only remaining layout constant and represents a card max-width, not a raw color/spacing Token.
All spacing, radius, border, shadow, typography, and color values use Token registry.

COR-013.title: 无障碍与键盘基础
changes: LoginView sets initial focus to account input on mount.
Validation errors focus the first invalid field.
Form uses native submit and Enter key submission.
ProductField/ProductPasswordField expose focus() for programmatic focus management.
Password visibility toggle is reachable and actionable via keyboard.
validation: Browser: account input is focused on initial load.
Browser: Tab order reaches account, password, show-password toggle, submit, return.
Browser: Enter in password field submits form.
Browser: first-error focus verified for empty account and empty password.

COR-021.title: 产品术语清理
changes: All user-facing copy uses product terminology ('账号', '密码', '登录', '登录已过期', '登录服务暂不可用', '返回原页面', '返回赛事').
No internal Worker/request/hash/protocol terminology appears on login surface.
validation: Browser: inspected login surface contains only Chinese product copy.

COR-028.title: 真实浏览器验收跨阶段门
changes: Performed route-specific narrow browser validation on /pgnViewer/login and /pgnViewer/login?reason=expired.
validation: Direct route entry renders non-empty DOM.
Real user state changes: validation error, invalid credentials, service unavailable, password visibility toggle, session expired banner, return navigation.

checks.defaultState: Product identity, page title, task description, account field with initial focus, password field, submit and return buttons rendered.
checks.validationErrors: Empty account and empty password each trigger inline validation and move focus to first invalid field.
checks.invalidCredentials: Submitting wrong credentials shows '账号或密码错误。' alert, clears password, focuses password.
checks.sessionExpired: Navigating to /login?reason=expired renders '登录已过期' warning banner and focuses account field.
checks.serviceUnavailable: Intercepted 503 response on PostLoginByPhone renders '登录服务暂不可用' error banner; screenshot saved to .ai/reports/PAGE_LOGIN_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE_EVIDENCE.png.
checks.passwordVisibility: Password visibility toggle reveals/hides password characters.
checks.enterSubmission: Enter in password field submits the form.
checks.safeReturn: Return button navigates to /competitions when no return param, or to sanitized return path when provided.
checks.focusOrder: Tab order: account → password → show-password toggle → submit → return.
checks.responsive: Narrow viewport keeps card within padding and readable; no horizontal overflow.

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)

risksAndNextSteps: Dark theme was not explicitly toggled in the browser during login validation; the page consumes theme Tokens and light/dark values are defined in src/styles/tokens.css.
Service-unavailable validation used a Playwright route interception returning HTTP 503; real network failures follow the same code path through ApiClientError kind mapping.
Direction 4 retains formal COR closure authority; this report records candidate evidence only.
